tasks.label: Rewrite email (clean) and push
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && had_stash=0 && if ! git diff --quiet -- .vscode/tasks.json; then git stash push -m temp_tasks_before_push3 -- .vscode/tasks.json && had_stash=1; fi && git fetch origin && n=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD) && if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then GIT_AUTHOR_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com GIT_COMMITTER_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com git rebase -x "git commit --amend --no-edit --reset-author" HEAD~$n; fi && git push origin main && if [ "$had_stash" -eq 1 ]; then git stash pop; fi

tasks.label: Recover from stuck rebase
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && backup=/tmp/copilot_tasks_recover_$$.json && had_file=0 && if [ -f .vscode/tasks.json ]; then mkdir -p /tmp && cp .vscode/tasks.json "$backup" && rm .vscode/tasks.json && had_file=1; fi && git rebase --abort || true && if [ "$had_file" -eq 1 ]; then mkdir -p .vscode && mv "$backup" .vscode/tasks.json; fi && git status --short

tasks.label: Abort rebase rewrite and push
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && git rebase --abort || true && had_stash=0 && if ! git diff --quiet -- .vscode/tasks.json; then git stash push -m temp_tasks_before_push2 -- .vscode/tasks.json && had_stash=1; fi && git fetch origin && n=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD) && if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then git rebase -x "GIT_AUTHOR_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com GIT_COMMITTER_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com git commit --amend --no-edit --reset-author" HEAD~$n; fi && git push origin main && if [ "$had_stash" -eq 1 ]; then git stash pop; fi

tasks.label: Recover rebase and push
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && GIT_AUTHOR_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com GIT_COMMITTER_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com git commit --amend --no-edit --reset-author && GIT_AUTHOR_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com GIT_COMMITTER_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com git rebase --continue && n=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD) && if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then git rebase -x "GIT_AUTHOR_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com GIT_COMMITTER_NAME=adubey-ai GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL=adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com git commit --amend --no-edit --reset-author" HEAD~$n; fi && git push origin main && if git stash list | grep -q temp_tasks_before_push; then git stash pop; fi

tasks.label: Rewrite email and push main
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && had_stash=0 && if ! git diff --quiet -- .vscode/tasks.json; then git stash push -m temp_tasks_before_push -- .vscode/tasks.json && had_stash=1; fi && n=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD) && if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then git rebase -x "git commit --amend --no-edit --reset-author --author=\"adubey-ai <adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com>\"" HEAD~$n; fi && git push origin main && if [ "$had_stash" -eq 1 ]; then git stash pop; fi

tasks.label: Git commits ahead of origin
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && git fetch origin && git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD && git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD

tasks.label: Rewrite local commit email to noreply
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && n=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD) && if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then git rebase -x "git commit --amend --no-edit --reset-author --author=\"adubey-ai <adubey-ai@users.noreply.github.com>\"" HEAD~$n; else echo "No local commits ahead of origin/main"; fi

tasks.label: Commit Binary_to_decimal.c
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && git add -- Binary_to_decimal.c && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Fix binary-to-decimal input handling in C"

tasks.label: Commit Binary_to_decimal.cpp
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && git add -- Binary_to_decimal.cpp && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Fix binary-to-decimal conversion in C++"

tasks.label: Commit .vscode/tasks.json
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && git add -- .vscode/tasks.json && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Update VS Code tasks for C++ build and run"

tasks.label: Commit changed files one by one
args: cd /workspaces/OOP-with-CPP && set -e && if ! git diff --quiet -- Anagram/anagram.cpp; then git add -- Anagram/anagram.cpp && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Fix input handling in anagram C++ program"; fi && if ! git diff --quiet -- Character_Count/character_count.cpp; then git add -- Character_Count/character_count.cpp && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Fix character frequency counting input handling"; fi && if ! git diff --quiet -- Palindrom/palindrom.cpp; then git add -- Palindrom/palindrom.cpp && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Fix palindrome string input in C++"; fi && if ! git diff --quiet -- Replace_Substring/replace_substring.cpp; then git add -- Replace_Substring/replace_substring.cpp && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Update replace substring file to modern headers"; fi && if ! git diff --quiet -- String_Palindrome/string_palindrom.cpp; then git add -- String_Palindrome/string_palindrom.cpp && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Repair broken string palindrome C++ implementation"; fi && if ! git diff --quiet -- .vscode/tasks.json; then git add -- .vscode/tasks.json && git -c user.name=adubey-ai -c user.email=adarshiist@gmail.com commit -m "Update VS Code tasks configuration"; fi && git status --short
